name: Guadalajara Gazpacho with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ripe tomatoes, seeded and Roughly chopped
1 cup Fresh corn off the cob (about 2 Ears)
8 large Shrimp, cooked, peeled, deveined and cut into 1/3-inch Chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, puree tomatoes, vegetable juice, chili sauce, and lime juice until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a large bowl.
3. Stir in onions, avocado, jicama, corn, salt, and pepper.
4. Chill for at least 2 hours. The gazpacho can also be made up to 2 days ahead and refrigerated.
5. To serve, stir and adjust seasoning as needed.
6. Divide the chilled gazpacho among 4 chilled soup bowls.
7. Garnish with chopped cilantro and shrimp.
Makes 4 servings.
